provenance.physical_qubits_note: Re-transpiled |+>^4 on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

transpilation.note: Re-transpiled with same settings; see ibm_qubit_layout.json

provenance.linkage_note: Jobs matched to result files by submission timestamp proximity. Job submission times cluster into groups matching file creation times.

random_basis_selection.note: March 7 initial tests. Random baseline operators selected via select_random_paulis(). Exact seed not recorded in original run; results are reproducible via stored expectation values and raw counts.
